datasetNotice: Seed dataset with sourced 2025 Grand Slam men's singles competition-prize rows, Australian Open 2025/2024/2023/2022/2021, Wimbledon 2026/2025/2024/2023/2022/2021, and US Open 2025/2024/2022/2021 tournament-total competition-prize rows, compatible Wimbledon 2025/2024/2023/2022/2021 operating-company financial denominators, plus explicitly labeled US Open and Roland Garros 2025/2024 total-player-compensation context rows. Wimbledon 2026 and non-Wimbledon revenue and profit/surplus remain unavailable unless a clear tournament-level financial source is added.
